title.en: With his current strength, he is almost the sam...

content.en:
Ye Tian's strength has improved, although it is still not as good as the Eight Extremes Realm like the True Yang Saint Ancestor, it is definitely not too weak.

With his current strength, he is almost the same as the weakest Eternal Realm.

However, Ye Tian was still unable to break the space-time barrier of the Source Sea and freely travel back and forth between the Source Sea and the space-time territory.

Breaking the barrier of time and space is not a matter of strength, but a matter of rules, the Eternal Realm and the Eternal Rules are completely integrated, so that they will not be blocked by the Source Sea Barrier, and if the half-step Eternal Realm is located, even if the strength reaches the level of the Nine Extremes Realm and the Half-step Eternal Realm, it is still impossible to break the Source Sea barrier.

this day.

Ye Tian condensed the clone in the Source Sea and sent the clone to the Primordial Sea.

He had always been very curious about the Primordial Sea, and he couldn't enter here because of his lack of strength before, but now that he had reached the half-step Eternal Realm combat power of the Eight Extremes Realm, he could naturally forcibly enter the Primordial Sea, or he could forcibly come out.

Tear and pull!

Ye Tian entered the Primordial Sea, and the powerful aura made the countless black mist insects in the Primordial Sea dare not approach.

Ye Tian was not interested in these black mist insects, but looked at the arm somewhere in the primordial sea, that arm was sealed in a void, and the ordinary extreme realm couldn't spy on the location of this arm at all, and even the seven-pole realm half-step eternal realm couldn't detect it.11

But Ye Tian could see the black mist river that that arm turned into, and felt the most primitive aura of this arm.

"This is not the arm of an ordinary Immortal Realm Lord, it is between the Immortal Realm and the Immortal Realm, it can be regarded as the arm of a half-step Immortal Realm Lord!" Ye Tian estimated.

Obviously, to be able to cut off the arm of such an Eternal Realm powerhouse, the person who made the attack was not an Immortal Realm, but also a half-step Immortal Realm.

Ye Tian probed for a while, but he didn't gain much, but he still took away all those resources.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian sensed that two powerful auras were approaching quickly, and immediately left here.

Rushing!!

The two Eternal Realms came to the Primordial Sea.

"One step too late, someone broke into here, it should be an eight-pole realm half-step eternal realm. One of the Eternal Realms guessed.

"It should be the Eight Extremes Realm of a certain space-time territory, who came here to try to impact the Nine Extremes Realm, and happened to find the Primordial Sea, thinking it was some kind of treasure land. "

"Many Eternal Realms and Eight Extremes Realms in the space-time territory know the origin of the Primordial Sea, and there happens to be one of the Eight Extremes Realm who doesn't know, but the other party will definitely investigate and understand now, and if you don't dare to come again, let's go!"

The two Eternal Realms left quickly without much investigation.

------------，-------

Eight pole building.

Ye Tian's copy body returned here from the Divine Sound Territory and informed the True Yang Holy Ancestor.

Soon, the True Yang Holy Ancestor also came to the Eight Poles Tower.

The two of them immediately began to chat. Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked, "True Yang Holy Ancestor, do you know the Origin Sea Primordial Sea?"

"The primordial sea?"

True Yang Saint Ancestor thought about it for a moment, then nodded and said, "I know a little bit, what's wrong?"

"I come from the source sea life, and the primordial sea is a treasure of the source sea, but there seem to be traces of the forces of the space-time territory there, so I am a little curious, so I ask, so as not to offend the forces of the space-time territory. Ye Tian explained.

"Endless Ancestor, the forces behind the Primordial Sea, we really can't offend. True Yang Saint Ancestor said solemnly: "As far as I know, the Primordial Sea used to be just an ordinary treasure land, but it was later transformed by the Phoenix Lord and used to cultivate the Black Mist Worm, which is the hatching base of the Black Mist Worm. Moreover, the Phoenix Lord had declared countless space-time territories that they must not be inserted into the Primordial Sea, otherwise they would be enemies of him. "

"Phoenix Lord!"

Ye Tian knew that this lord was one of the Immortal Realm Lords, a powerhouse who was at the true top of countless space-time territories.

The Phoenix Lord still has a lot of Eternal Realm under his command, so the power of the Phoenix Lord is huge.

"What is the Phoenix Lord doing with cultivating those black fog worms?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

"Do the experiment!" True Yang Saint Ancestor said: "This is news from the outside world, saying that the Phoenix Lord cultivated a large number of Black Mist Worms in the Primordial Sea, and then regularly sent them to the Phoenix Territory for secondary cultivation to help these Black Mist Worms ascend to the Half-Step Eternal Realm, so that countless Half-Step Eternal Realm test materials can be harvested." However, there is also a theory that the Phoenix Lord is studying the power of the Void Beast. "

"Void Beast?"

This is the first time Ye Tian has heard of it.

True Yang Saint Ancestor introduced: "The Void Beast is a kind of creature that wanders outside the Source Sea, it has been staying in the Void Region, and there are not many of them, it has long been killed by those Immortal Realm Lords, I am afraid that it is in the depths of the Void Region far away from the Source Sea that the traces of the Void Beast can be found." But few Eternal Realms dared to go anywhere, it was too far away from the Source Sea to identify the location, and it was easy to get lost. It is said that the strong people who were lost in the depths of the Void Zone almost did not come back. "

"That arm in the primordial sea is the arm of the Void Beast?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Yes!" True Yang Saint Ancestor nodded, "It is said that when the Phoenix Lord was still in the half-step immortal realm, he fought with a powerful Void Beast and finally cut off one of the opponent's arms, but the Void Beast did not die, but fled. What happened to us is not what we know. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

The Phoenix Lord cut off one of the arms of the Void Beast and threw it into the Primordial Sea, and discovered that the Black Mist Worm could reproduce with the help of the Void Beast's arm, so he used it to study the Black Mist Worm.

As for whether or not to do other things with black fog bugs, it's not very clear.

"I also collected some bones from the Void Beast, but fortunately the Phoenix Lord didn't know about it, otherwise I'm afraid you would have to trouble me. Ye Tian thought to himself.

857 learned that the Primordial Sea was the territory of the Phoenix Lord, Ye Tian was not ready to continue to spy on the Primordial Sea, otherwise he would really provoke the Phoenix Lord, he would not be able to resist, even the Eight Pole Towers would not help him.

However, one thing is certain, the Void Beast is afraid that it is not simple, otherwise an Immortal Realm powerhouse like the Phoenix Lord would not study the Black Mist Worm derived from the flesh and blood of the Void Beast.

In fact, Ye Tian was also very curious about the Void Beast.

What kind of talent would such a being have? If his copying talent copied the talent of the Void Beast, wouldn't it be tantamount to a great opportunity?

"Forget it, let's cultivate hard, and strive to touch the second boundary barrier first. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Bajilou often organizes gatherings and often talks together.

And Ye Tian also often participated, and he gradually became familiar with the other Eight Extremes Realm of the Eight Poles Building.

To be able to become the Eight Extremes Realm, everyone has only one goal, that is, to be promoted to the Nine Extremes Realm, or to the Eternal Realm.

this day.

One of the Eight Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse who had touched the second boundary barrier in the Eight Extremes Building invited many Eight Extremes Realms to participate in a meeting.

When Ye Tian came to the Baji Tower, he was immediately surprised.

What appeared in front of him was an old man who exuded an aura of decay, as if his life was running out.

And he is the eighth-level realm powerhouse of the Eight Pole Towers who has touched the second boundary barrier, Gu He Yuanzu one by one!_

Fei Lu reminds you: three things to read - ∪ collection, recommendation, and sharing??
